summary: Phase 10 testing complete. All 22 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified: 1) SaaS Admin Dashboard loads for super_admin with KPIs, tenants table, WABA status, 2) Team Inbox page loads with conversation list, chat panel, memory sidebar, 3) Mobile Owner Dashboard loads for tenant_admin with KPIs, quick actions, AI status, 4) More tab shows Team Inbox link, 5) Business Rules page still works, 6) Emotion detection API detects all 6 emotions correctly, 7) Follow-up config API works with auto-seeding, 8) Lead capture funnel returns category-specific fields, 9) SaaS admin endpoints return 403 for tenant_admin.
seed_data_creation: Follow-up config auto-seeds defaults on first access per tenant. Lead fields are category-specific (astrology has birth_date/time/place, real_estate has budget/location/property_type).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 10 testing complete. All features verified: 1) SaaS Admin (9948303060) sees SaaSAdminDashboard on login with KPIs, tenants table, WABA status, admin links. 2) Tenant Admin (8888888888) sees MobileOwnerDashboard with KPIs, quick actions, AI status, category widgets. 3) Team Inbox (/team-inbox) shows conversation list, chat panel, memory sidebar. 4) Emotion detection API (/api/memoraai/engine/detect-emotion) detects angry/happy/urgent/confused/bargaining/neutral. 5) Follow-up config (/api/memoraai/engine/followup-config) auto-seeds defaults. 6) Lead fields (/api/memoraai/engine/lead-fields?category=astrology) returns 5 category-specific fields. 7) Lead capture (/api/memoraai/engine/capture-lead) creates structured leads. 8) SaaS admin endpoints (/api/memoraai/saas-admin/*) return 403 for tenant_admin. 9) Business Rules page still works.

team_inbox_api.GET /api/memoraai/inbox/conversations: PASS - Returns conversations list with count
team_inbox_api.GET /api/memoraai/inbox/stats: PASS - Returns total_conversations, active, human_mode, ai_mode, messages_today, unread

emotion_detection_api.confused: PASS - Detects 'don't understand', 'not clear', 'explain' → explanatory style

followup_config_api.GET /api/memoraai/engine/followup-config: PASS - Returns config with enabled, timing, max_followups, stop_on_reply

lead_capture_api.GET /api/memoraai/engine/lead-fields?cat: PASS - Returns 5 fields: name, birth_date, birth_time, birth_place, concern
PASS - Returns 5 fields: name, budget, location, property_type, timeline
lead_capture_api.POST /api/memoraai/engine/capture-lead: PASS - Creates lead with phone, name, fields, score, tags
lead_capture_api.GET /api/memoraai/engine/leads: PASS - Returns leads list with count
lead_capture_api.GET /api/memoraai/engine/leads/stats: PASS - Returns total, hot, warm, cold counts

saas_admin_api.GET /api/memoraai/saas-admin/dashboard (: PASS - Returns overview with total_tenants, total_users, waba_configured, etc.
